ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-foundation-fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-foundation-fabric
Language: hcl
End-to-end modular samples and landing zones toolkit for Terraform on GCP.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-alb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-alb
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision a standard ALB for HTTP/HTTP traffic

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ec2-autoscale-group
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-ec2-autoscale-group
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision Auto Scaling Group and Launch Template on AWS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecr
Language: hcl
Terraform Module to manage Docker Container Registries on AWS ECR

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
Language: hcl
Terraform module to generate well-formed JSON documents (container definitions) that are passed to the aws_ecs_task_definition Terraform resource

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-lb-s3-bucket
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-lb-s3-bucket
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision an S3 bucket with built in IAM policy to allow AWS Load Balancers to ship access logs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/setup-packer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/setup-packer
Language: hcl
Run HashiCorp Packer as part of your GitHub Actions Workflow

ns0:entry.ns0:title: semgrep/semgrep-rules
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/semgrep/semgrep-rules
Language: hcl
Semgrep Community Edition rules, maintained by Semgrep and the community. Free to use under the Semgrep Rules License.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create Amazon Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
Language: hcl
Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create AWS S3 resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
Language: hcl
Terraform module to create AWS VPC resources 🇺🇦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-storage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-storage
Language: hcl
Creates one or more Cloud Storage buckets and assigns basic permissions on them to arbitrary users

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-gcloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-gcloud
Language: hcl
Executes Google Cloud CLI commands within Terraform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-memorystore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-memorystore
Language: hcl
Creates a fully functional Google Memorystore (redis) instance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-project-factory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-project-factory
Language: hcl
Creates an opinionated Google Cloud project by using Shared VPC, IAM, and Google Cloud APIs
